```js title=main.js
"use strict";
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"./a.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (abc)
});
/* import */ var _dep_a__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./dep.js?a");


function abc() {
	return _dep_a__rspack_import_0.x;
}


},
"./b.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
/* import */ var _dep_b__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./dep.js?b");


function abc() {
	return x;
}


},
"./c.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
/* import */ var _dep_c__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./dep.js?c");


function abc() {
	return _dep_c__rspack_import_0.x;
}

abc();


},
"./d.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (def)
});
/* import */ var _dep_d__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./dep.js?d");


class def {
	method() {
		return _dep_d__rspack_import_0.x;
	}
}


},
"./dep.js?a"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export),
  x: () => (x)
});
const x = "x";

/* export default */ const __rspack_default_export = (true);


},
"./dep.js?b"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export)
});
const x = "x";

/* export default */ const __rspack_default_export = (false);


},
"./dep.js?c"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;

  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export),
  x: () => (x)
});
const x = "x";

/* export default */ const __rspack_default_export = (true);


},
"./dep.js?d"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;

  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export),
  x: () => (x)
});

},

  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export)

"./dep.js?f"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {

  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export),

"./e.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;

class def {
	method() {
		return x;
	}
}


},
"./f.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
/* import */ var _dep_f__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./dep.js?f");


class def {
	method() {
		return _dep_f__rspack_import_0.x;
	}
}

new def().method();


},
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
/* import */ var _a__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./a.js");
/* import */ var _b__rspack_import_1 = __rspack_require("./b.js");
/* import */ var _c__rspack_import_2 = __rspack_require("./c.js");
/* import */ var _d__rspack_import_3 = __rspack_require("./d.js");
/* import */ var _e__rspack_import_4 = __rspack_require("./e.js");
/* import */ var _f__rspack_import_5 = __rspack_require("./f.js");
/* import */ var _dep_a__rspack_import_6 = __rspack_require("./dep.js?a");
/* import */ var _dep_b__rspack_import_7 = __rspack_require("./dep.js?b");
/* import */ var _dep_c__rspack_import_8 = __rspack_require("./dep.js?c");
/* import */ var _dep_d__rspack_import_9 = __rspack_require("./dep.js?d");
/* import */ var _dep_e__rspack_import_10 = __rspack_require("./dep.js?e");
/* import */ var _dep_f__rspack_import_11 = __rspack_require("./dep.js?f");














it("should generate valid code", () => {
	expect((0,_a__rspack_import_0["default"])()).toBe("x");
	expect(new _d__rspack_import_3["default"]().method()).toBe("x");
});

it("a should be used", () => {
	expect(_dep_a__rspack_import_6["default"]).toBe(true);
});

if (true) {
	it("b should be unused", () => {
		expect(_dep_b__rspack_import_7["default"]).toBe(false);
	});
}

it("c should be used", () => {
	expect(_dep_c__rspack_import_8["default"]).toBe(true);
});

if (true) {
	it("d should be used", () => {
		expect(_dep_d__rspack_import_9["default"]).toBe(true);
	});

	it("e should be unused", () => {
		expect(_dep_e__rspack_import_10["default"]).toBe(false);
	});
}

it("f should be used", () => {
	expect(_dep_f__rspack_import_11["default"]).toBe(true);
});


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./index.js"));

}
]);
```
